author: Warren Reed Baum
name: MLP3x 9L 512d — RTX 4090 Sweep Best
blurb: Non-record submission: 9-layer, 512d model with 3x MLP multiplier (1536 FFN hidden dim). Standard Muon optimizer + int8 zlib quantization. Achieved 1.4530 bpb on single RTX 4090 in ~10 min wallclock (960 steps before time cap). MLP3x outperformed all other configs in our automated sweep. Key insight: wider MLPs beat deeper stacking at this param budget.
